title: Frontier planner
blurb: Use a flagship model like GPT-5.5, NextOpus, or Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview for decomposition, recovery planning, and hard reasoning.

title: Cheap executor
blurb: Route repetitive substeps to a mini or flash-class model so your agents do not burn flagship tokens making peanut butter sandwiches.

title: Verifier loop
blurb: Use a fast, cheaper reviewer for retry decisions, output grading, and post-tool sanity checks.

title: Local privacy rail
blurb: Keep local coding, private corpora, and offline automation on a 4090-hosted model when data sensitivity beats raw benchmark glory.
